task_completion.description: Agent views the work packages list in the 'DevOps Automation' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the OpenProject interface with 'DevOps Automation' selected as the current project and the Work Packages module open.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the project selector or dashboard being used to select 'Mobile Banking App'.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the work packages list in the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Work Packages module open within the 'Mobile Banking App' project.

task_completion.description: The work package 'Set up application monitoring and alerting' exists in the 'Mobile Banking App' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The work package list or details view in the 'Mobile Banking App' project clearly displays a work package with the exact subject 'Set up application monitoring and alerting'.

task_completion.description: The work package does not exist in the 'DevOps Automation' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A view of the 'DevOps Automation' work packages list showing that 'Set up application monitoring and alerting' is not present, or a successful 'move' confirmation toast/message.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface via the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser with the OpenProject UI, rather than terminal windows or API scripts.

integrity.description: The work package is a genuine record in the OpenProject system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The work package appears in the standard OpenProject list view or detail view with an ID number, not just as text written in a notepad or search bar.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply copy the work package leaving a duplicate in the source.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the work package existing in both projects simultaneously (e.g., no 'copy successful' messages without a subsequent deletion in the source).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target project: 'Mobile Banking App'. Source project: 'DevOps Automation'. Work package subject: 'Set up application monitoring and alerting'. Note: Due to an environment defect, the work package is initially missing from the source project. The agent is allowed to pass by creating the work package directly in the target project, or by creating it in the source and moving it. The final state must show the work package in the target project and absent from the source project.
